item.name: Centurio Tiger Horn
item.description: The horn of a beast felled on a legendary Hunt used to summon a legendary tiger gifted to you by the Clan Centurio.

mount.name: Centurio Tiger
mount.action: Summon forth your Centurio tiger, one mark the Clan actually does not want seen slain.
mount.description: In a rare display of misguided compassion, a member of Clan Centurio returned from a Hunt with the cub of a slain S-rank mark. Unable to grant it mercy, the veteran took to caring for the beast until his deceit was discovered and his membership revoked. But by then, not a single member could bring themselves to harm the pet they had all come to love.
mount.tooltip:
This game of cat and mouse
continued for what seemed
an eternity.
- Alberic
